description: Represents a permission assignment granting a group access to a Dynatrace environment or account-level capability.
name: Permission

permissionName.description: The name of the permission, e.g., tenant-viewer, tenant-operator, tenant-admin, account-company-info.

scope.description: The scope identifier the permission applies to. For environment permissions, this is the environment ID. For account permissions, this is the account UUID.

scopeType.description: The type of scope. ACCOUNT for account-level permissions, TENANT for environment-level permissions.

groupId.description: The ID of the group this permission is assigned to.
